TestCase z30Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Replace subarray elements with their negated values (negate all elements)
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.data[i] = -follow_case.data[i];
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
